reviews.comment:
Como la mayoría de las YPF los playeros tardan en atender , no te limpian el parabrisas,  cuando pagué con la aplicación le pedí que me explicara como hacer con los puntos y se quedó mirando su celular,  en el Shop las empleadas poca atención, tuve que esperar como 10 minutos mientras charlaban entre ellas, excepto una que estaba limpiando los vidrios,  vino me atendió muy bien

(Translated by Google)
Like most YPF stores, the attendants take a while to serve you, they don't clean your windshield, when I paid with the app I asked him to explain how to do it with the points and he kept looking at his cell phone, in the Shop the employees were not very attentive, I had to wait like 10 minutes while they chatted among themselves, except for one who was cleaning the windows, she served me very well
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXOV9EUUxnEAE

reviews.comment:

The ACA station is old-fashioned. The facilities are well-maintained, although a modernization wouldn't hurt either.
